object_a.label: window
object_a.description: living room left window with blinds
object_a.long_form_open_description: Tall rectangular window directly to the left of the fireplace with white blinds and light-colored curtains partially open; admits natural light into the living area.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: left side of the fireplace, behind the recliner

object_b.label: window
object_b.description: tall window with white blinds and trim
object_b.long_form_open_description: Rectangular window with white horizontal blinds and white trim identical to the left window. Outside light visible through the blinds. Positioned symmetrically opposite the left window.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Located to the right of the fireplace, behind the right recliner and next to the curtain on the right wall.
